pullRequests.title: feat: add multi-language support (i18n)
pullRequests.bodyText: Adds i18n support using react-i18next. Currently includes English and Japanese locale files. Other languages can be added by contributing to the locales/ directory.
pullRequests.author: eve

reviews.author: alice
reviews.bodyText: Great initiative. Have you looked at i18next? It handles pluralization and interpolation well.

comments.author: eve
comments.bodyText: Yes, planning to use react-i18next for the frontend and i18next-fs-backend for the CLI layer.

pullRequests.title: feat: redesign user onboarding flow
pullRequests.bodyText: Complete redesign of the multi-step onboarding wizard. New flow: account setup → team invite → workspace config → tutorial. Tracks completion analytics.
pullRequests.author: alice

reviews.author: bob
reviews.bodyText: The step progression logic is unclear — it's not obvious when a step is considered complete vs skipped. Also the analytics hooks are missing.

reviews.author: carol
reviews.bodyText: Agree with Bob. The step state machine needs clearer transitions.

reviews.author: bob
reviews.bodyText: Step logic is better, but error recovery is broken now — if the team invite API fails, the wizard gets stuck.

reviews.author: carol
reviews.bodyText: LGTM after the error handling fix.

reviews.author: bob
reviews.bodyText: All issues resolved. Ship it.

comments.author: alice
comments.bodyText: Pushed the step state machine refactor. Each step now has explicit `pending/active/complete/skipped` states.

comments.author: bob
comments.bodyText: The state machine is clearer now. But the team invite step can still get stuck if the API times out — needs a retry or skip fallback.

comments.author: alice
comments.bodyText: Added retry with exponential backoff (max 3 attempts) and a skip option after the third failure. Also added analytics events for each step transition.

commits.author: alice

commits.author: alice

commits.author: alice

commits.author: alice

commits.author: alice

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add analytics tracking for step transitions
commits.author: alice

commits.messageHeadline: test: add unit tests for step state machine
commits.author: alice

pullRequests.title: feat: replace REST API with GraphQL
pullRequests.bodyText: Proposes a full migration from REST to GraphQL using Apollo Server. Schema defined in schema.graphql. All existing REST endpoints would be deprecated.
pullRequests.author: carol

reviews.author: alice
reviews.bodyText: This would silently break all existing API clients. We need a versioning strategy and migration period before removing REST endpoints.

reviews.author: dave
reviews.bodyText: Too risky without a proper deprecation strategy. Also our mobile clients are pinned to the REST API and can't update quickly.

comments.author: carol
comments.bodyText: REST has been causing performance issues with complex queries — clients are making 5–8 chained requests for a single screen. GraphQL would solve that with a single query.

comments.author: alice
comments.bodyText: Agreed on the problem. But the solution should be additive — add a /graphql endpoint alongside REST, not replace it. Give clients time to migrate over 6–12 months.

comments.author: bob
comments.bodyText: Agree with Alice. Let's also check if REST + DataLoader could solve the N+1 problem first before committing to GraphQL.

comments.author: carol
comments.bodyText: Fair points. I'll open a separate RFC for the opt-in GraphQL endpoint approach. Closing this PR.

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add Apollo Server with initial schema
commits.author: carol

commits.messageHeadline: feat: migrate user and auth resolvers to GraphQL
commits.author: carol

commits.messageHeadline: feat: migrate project and workspace resolvers
commits.author: carol

pullRequests.title: feat: add request rate limiting to public API endpoints
pullRequests.bodyText: Implements sliding window rate limiting using Redis. Limits are configurable per route. Returns 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded.
pullRequests.author: carol

reviews.author: dave
reviews.bodyText: Solid implementation, the sliding window approach makes sense for our traffic patterns

reviews.author: alice
reviews.bodyText: Nice work. Worth noting the Redis dependency in the deployment docs.

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add rate limiter middleware with Redis backend
commits.author: carol

commits.messageHeadline: feat: apply rate limiting to /api/v1 routes
commits.author: carol

pullRequests.title: fix: login button unresponsive after failed auth attempt
pullRequests.bodyText: After a failed login attempt, the button enters a disabled state and never recovers. Added a reset on the error boundary so users can retry without refreshing the page.
pullRequests.author: alice

reviews.author: bob
reviews.bodyText: LGTM, good catch

commits.messageHeadline: fix: reset login button state after auth error
commits.author: alice

pullRequests.title: feat: replace session cookies with JWT tokens
pullRequests.bodyText: Migrates auth from server-side sessions to stateless JWT. Access token TTL is 15m, refresh token is 7d. Resolves scalability issues with session storage.
pullRequests.author: dave

reviews.author: alice
reviews.bodyText: JWT rotation logic is missing. Please add a refresh-token endpoint and document the expiry strategy before merging.

reviews.author: alice
reviews.bodyText: Refresh-token flow looks solid. Approved.

comments.author: alice
comments.bodyText: Token expiry should be configurable via environment variable, not hardcoded to 15m.

comments.author: dave
comments.bodyText: Agreed. Will address in a follow-up PR to keep this diff focused.

comments.author: bob
comments.bodyText: Should we also invalidate old tokens on logout? Right now a stolen token stays valid until expiry.

comments.author: dave
comments.bodyText: Good point. Need a token blocklist for that. Tracking in issue #510.

commits.messageHeadline: feat: implement JWT issuance and validation
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add refresh token rotation logic
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: refactor: remove session middleware and Redis session store
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add /auth/refresh endpoint and rotation policy
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: docs: document JWT rotation strategy
commits.author: dave

pullRequests.title: feat: add real-time dashboard for system health metrics
pullRequests.bodyText: Adds a /metrics/dashboard endpoint that aggregates CPU, memory, request latency, and error rates. Metrics are streamed via SSE. Includes a data retention policy (7 days default).
pullRequests.author: dave

reviews.author: alice
reviews.bodyText: Looks good overall. Please add a data retention policy so old metrics don't accumulate indefinitely.

reviews.author: bob
reviews.bodyText: Retention policy is solid. Ship it.

reviews.author: carol
reviews.bodyText: LGTM

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add metrics aggregation service
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add SSE endpoint for dashboard streaming
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: feat: add 7-day data retention with cron cleanup
commits.author: dave

commits.messageHeadline: test: add unit tests for retention policy
commits.author: dave
